ddls:
CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_number" INTEGER /* Number of the generation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the generation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the generation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the generation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the generation */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the generation */,
  "total_iterations" INTEGER /* Total number of iterations in the generation */,
  "best_fitness_value" REAL /* Best fitness value achieved in the generation */,
  "convergence_status" TEXT /* Convergence status of the generation (e.g., converged, not converged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generations_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation the iteration belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the iteration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the iteration */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the iteration */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the iteration */,
  "total_trials" INTEGER /* Total number of trials in the iteration */,
  "best_fitness_value" REAL /* Best fitness value achieved in the iteration */,
  "convergence_status" TEXT /* Convergence status of the iteration (e.g., converged, not converged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial */,
  "fitness_value" REAL /* Fitness value of the trial */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the trial */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the trial */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trial */,
  "parameter_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parameter set used in the trial */,
  "convergence_status" TEXT /* Convergence status of the trial (e.g., converged, not converged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the parameters belong to */,
  "vl_1" REAL /* Value of parameter Vl_1 */,
  "vr_1" REAL /* Value of parameter Vr_1 */,
  "vl_2" REAL /* Value of parameter Vl_2 */,
  "vr_2" REAL /* Value of parameter Vr_2 */,
  "vl_3" REAL /* Value of parameter Vl_3 */,
  "vr_3" REAL /* Value of parameter Vr_3 */,
  "vl_4" REAL /* Value of parameter Vl_4 */,
  "vr_4" REAL /* Value of parameter Vr_4 */,
  "vl_5" REAL /* Value of parameter Vl_5 */,
  "vr_5" REAL /* Value of parameter Vr_5 */,
  "vl_6" REAL /* Value of parameter Vl_6 */,
  "vr_6" REAL /* Value of parameter Vr_6 */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter set */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the parameter set */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter set */,
  "parameter_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parameter set */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "previous_values" TEXT /* JSON object containing the previous values of the record */,
  "new_values" TEXT /* JSON object containing the new values of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
